Title: Workstream Alignment – Values & Identity
Description: Multiple workstreams must be aligned across curriculum, Arabic pedagogy, values integration, and implementation oversight.
Mitigation: Sequence the programme into phased delivery tracks with clear owners, milestones, and decision points. Issue implementation guidance early and monitor readiness through structured check-ins with schools.

Title: League Scheduling & Facility Coordination
Description: League-format delivery requires strong scheduling, facility access, and coordination across participating schools.
Mitigation: Lock the competition calendar and district approach early. Track uptake by sport and intervene quickly where participation or operational readiness is weaker than expected.

Title: Chronic Absenteeism – Multi-driver Complexity
Description: Chronic absenteeism is influenced by multiple drivers including student risk factors, family engagement, and inconsistent school follow-up.
Mitigation: Use integrated attendance data to flag priority students and schools early. Strengthen parent engagement, policy enforcement, and recognition mechanisms.

Title: AI in Schools – Undefined Timeline & Readiness
Description: Core delivery elements including implementation timing and enabling conditions still require confirmation.
Mitigation: Confirm the phased 2026 scope, delivery pathway, and ownership model before full rollout. Start with a focused AI fluency track.

Title: Teacher Quality – Interdependent Reform Complexity
Description: The teacher transformation programme combines several interdependent reforms. Critical design elements and sequencing still need to be locked.
Mitigation: Prioritise foundational components first: proficiency framework, profiling model, and onboarding approach. Use a sequenced roadmap with named owners and pilot milestones.

Title: Affordable School Model – Market Feasibility
Description: Expanding affordable provision requires the right regulatory model, investor interest, and viable operating conditions.
Mitigation: Finalise the policy and investment model early. Engage potential operators in parallel to test feasibility before full rollout.

Title: Leading Schools Attraction – Competitive Market
Description: Attraction depends on a competitive value proposition, licensing clarity, and a smooth journey from investor interest to operations.
Mitigation: Coordinate a streamlined licensing-to-operations pathway. Target selected operators through a focused engagement plan backed by a clear investment proposition.
